summary: Tested Form Designer field type sub-options, upload state machine, and equipment hierarchy search. All 9 features tested and working correctly. Backend unit tests: 18/18 passed.

issues: Minor: React warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Field type sub-options implementation is clean and well-organized with distinct colored sections (slate for numeric, blue for dropdown, purple for range, green for file, indigo for equipment)
Upload state machine properly handles: idle -> uploading (spinner) -> success/error (retry button)
Field type change correctly clears previous type's sub-options to prevent data contamination
Equipment hierarchy preview shows all 5 levels with search test functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Form Designer field type sub-options are fully implemented and working. Each field type shows correct sub-options: Numeric (unit + thresholds), Dropdown/Multi-select (options with failure toggle), Range (min/max/step), File/Image (max size + extensions), Equipment (hierarchy preview + search). Upload state machine handles uploading/error/retry states. Field type change clears previous sub-options.

numeric_field_suboptions.description: Numeric field shows Unit and Threshold settings (warning/critical low/high)
numeric_field_suboptions.details: Unit input field present, Warning Low/High inputs (amber), Critical Low/High inputs (red) all visible and functional

dropdown_field_suboptions.description: Dropdown/Multi-select fields show Options section with Add Option button
dropdown_field_suboptions.details: Options section visible with Add Option button, each option has label input and Failure toggle switch

range_field_suboptions.details: Range Settings section (purple background) with Min, Max, Step number inputs

file_image_field_suboptions.description: File/Image fields show Max Size and Allowed Extensions settings
file_image_field_suboptions.details: Upload Settings section (green background) with Max File Size (MB) and Allowed Extensions inputs

equipment_field_suboptions.description: Equipment field shows hierarchy preview and test search
equipment_field_suboptions.details: Equipment Selection Settings section (indigo background) with hierarchy level badges (Installation > System > Unit > Subunit > Equipment) and search test input

field_type_change_clears_suboptions.description: Field type change clears previous type's sub-options
field_type_change_clears_suboptions.details: Switching from Numeric to Text clears numeric sub-options, switching back shows empty fields

upload_uploading_state.description: Document upload shows proper uploading state with spinner
upload_uploading_state.details: Code review confirms Loader2 spinner icon with 'Uploading...' text during upload

upload_error_retry_state.description: Document upload error state shows retry button
upload_error_retry_state.details: Code review confirms AlertCircle icon for errors, RefreshCw retry button, and X remove button

equipment_search_hierarchy.description: Equipment search in form designer returns results with hierarchy path
equipment_search_hierarchy.details: API /api/equipment-hierarchy/search works correctly, returns results with path/full_path. Empty results expected when no matching equipment exists.

/api/equipment-hierarchy/search.response: Returns empty results when no matching equipment (expected behavior)
